arts.ttl: Confirmed Lineups: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Sparta Prague
arts.sum: Official team news has just been released for Die Werkself who host Sparta Prague to round off the group phase on Matchday 8 of the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'on the verge' of transfer agreement amid mega bids for Jhon Duran and Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Al-Nassr are reportedly on the verge of reaching a verbal agreement with Aston Villa over signing Jhon Duran. Then, after assisting Jacob Ramsey in the draw with West Ham last weekend, Watkins reached 100 goal involvements in the fewest Premier League games (169) by any player since Kevin De Bruyne achieved the milestone in 155 matches in July 2020.

arts.ttl: Champions League final group games: join us for updates on all 18 matches – live
arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Here are those fixtures … Aston Villa v Celtic Barcelona v Atalanta Bayer Leverkusen v Sparta Prague Bayern Munich v Slovan Bratislava Borussia Dortmund v Shakhtar Donetsk Brest v Real Madrid Dinamo Zagreb v AC Milan Girona v Arsenal Internazionale v Monaco Juventus v Benfica Lille v Feyenoord Manchester City v Club Brugge PSV v Liverpool Red Bull Salzburg v Atletico Madrid Sporting v Bologna Sturm Graz v RB Leipzig Stuttgart v Paris Saint-Germain Young Boys v Red Star Belgrade Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen complete loan signing of Aston Villa's Emiliano Buendía
arts.sum: "The Bundesliga really appeals to me and Leverkusen are the defending champions and, for me, one of the best and most interesting teams in Europe right now," explained Buendía. Buendía, 28, makes the switch to the defending Bundesliga champions as a direct replacement for Martin Terrier, who was recently ruled out for the rest of the campaign with a torn Achilles.

arts.ttl: Emiliano Buendía passes Bayer Leverkusen medical
arts.sum: ‘Nothing should stand in the way’ of Emiliano Buendía’s loan move from Aston Villa to Bayer Leverkusen, according to Sky Germany. The Argentine has already passed a medical with the…

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz likely to extend Bayer Leverkusen contract until 2028 with a release clause worth €125m valid in 2026
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Florian Wirtz will likely extend his contract at Bayer Leverkusen until 2028 with a release clause to be included. Interested clubs across Europe are aware that Wirtz…

arts.ttl: Champions League permuations as Liverpool, Arsenal, Man City and Aston Villa face decisive matches
arts.sum: The final fixtures of the group stage of the 2025 Champions League take place on Wednesday evening and with every side set to be in action throughout the evening, plenty could still happen

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr reach agreement to sign Victor Boniface
arts.sum: Al-Nassr have reached an agreement worth around €60m to sign Bayer Leverkusen forward Victor Boniface (24), according to Sky Germany. The Nigerian becomes the club’s second most expensive departure in…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen have only lost once, so why are they six points behind Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: Defending Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen have only lost once in the league so far this season, so how come they're six points behind leaders Bayern Munich? First-half goals from Patrik Schick and Aleix García had put Leverkusen 2-0 up and on course for the points, but they were pegged back and failed to win – and not for the first time this season.

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface: Leverkusen star left out of training amid transfer
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen's Victor Boniface was left out of training on Tuesday as German media reports linked the striker with a move to Saudi Arabian club Al Nassr, with manager Xabi Alonso saying negotiations for the player's transfer were ongoing. Our preparation for the match remains the same," Alonso told reporters ahead of the Champions League clash against Sparta Prague on Wednesday.
